summary: Iteration 89 - Feature Audit for Navkar Agro Mill Entry System. All 11 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Key features verified: Login with admin/admin123, agent-payments returns agent_name from entries, cash-book/agent-names endpoint returns mandi_names/truck_numbers/agent_names, balance sheet calculates agent_accounts from entries+ledger, cash-book DELETE works, FY Summary has complete sections.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test transactions during testing, both cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working. Cash Book shows party types correctly, Party Summary tab shows 20 parties with Jama/Nikasi/Balance. Balance Sheet page under FY Summary tab shows Agent/Mandi Accounts with Balance: -4,000.00 (correctly calculated from entries and ledger). Truck Accounts also visible. ErrorBoundary is in place and not triggered.

verified: Frontend login redirects to main app with ADMIN badge
Response is a list of agent payments
Each payment has agent_name field populated from entries aggregation
Uses $first aggregation to get agent_name from mill_entries
Response has mandi_names from mandi_targets collection

balance_sheet_agent_accounts.description: GET /api/fy-summary/balance-sheet calculates agent_accounts from entries + ledger
verified: Each account has: name, total (from mill_entries.agent_amount), paid (from ledger nikasi), balance
UI shows Agent/Mandi Accounts section with Balance: -4,000.00

cash_book_party_type_auto_detect.description: POST /api/cash-book with agent category auto-detects party_type
verified: Auto-detection checks: mandi_targets, private_paddy, rice_sales, diesel_accounts, etc.
Transaction removed from database after delete
Linked payment reversal code exists for truck/agent payments

fy_summary_complete.description: GET /api/fy-summary returns complete summary with all sections
verified: paddy_stock section with opening_stock, paddy_in, paddy_used, closing_stock
byproducts section with bran, kunda, broken, kanki, husk
Response has party_list or parties data

cash_book_ui.description: Cash Book page loads and shows transactions with party types
verified: Party Summary tab shows 20 parties, 16 settled, 4 pending
Party types shown: Agent, Truck, Diesel, Staff, Gunny Bag, Purchase Voucher

balance_sheet_ui.description: Balance Sheet page loads under FY Summary tab
verified: FY Summary -> Balance Sheet tab accessible
LIABILITIES section shows Capital Account, Sundry Creditors
ASSETS section shows Cash & Bank, Stock-in-Hand, Sundry Debtors, Loans & Advances
PDF and Excel export buttons present

error_boundary.description: ErrorBoundary is present and not triggered
verified: No error-boundary div visible during testing

code_review_notes.agent_payments_agent_name: payments.py line 860 uses $first aggregation to get agent_name from mill_entries
code_review_notes.cash_book_agent_names: cashbook.py lines 446-457 fetches mandi_names from mandi_targets, truck_numbers and agent_names from mill_entries using distinct()
code_review_notes.balance_sheet_agent_accounts: fy_summary.py lines 426-442 correctly calculates: total from mill_entries.agent_amount, paid from ledger nikasi transactions (case-insensitive match)
code_review_notes.cash_book_delete_reversal: cashbook.py lines 365-413 handles truck/agent payment reversal via linked_payment_id prefix checks
